labels.value: An error occured while creating the members.

labels.shortDescription: ADD TO EVENT SELECT AT LEAST
labels.value: Select at least one record and try again.
Campaign members has been created successfully.
Subscribing to all shares per alert types
Subscribing to all alerts. Please wait...
Please ensure the related Company has an attached 'LEGAL ENTITY' before submitting for approval
Campaign Name starts with (one char at least)

labels.shortDescription: Used in AgreementUtil Class method getallLegalEntities

labels.value: You must tick a Compliance Clearing.
Error! Record is not validated or not properly synced. You are being redirected to record page.
Deleting all shares per alert types
You must complete KYD Due Diligence Oversight before IS can approve
Record has not yet been synced with website.
Error! Please sync record before resetting password. You are being redirected to record. Please wait...
Contact's website country does not correspond to share class selected countries. Please update the share class field.

labels.shortDescription: Button label to add a new filter
Button/label for adding restricted share types
Button label to add items to the Grid
Error message when agreement settings fail to load
Column header for Agreement Grid History
Section title for the grids recap in the Agreement Grid Recap component
Status text for already selected items
Help text explaining automatic Grid update behavior
labels.value: When enabled, any newly created funds or share classes that meet the Grid criteria will be automatically added to the Grid. With Automatic Grid Update, only one Standard Grid can be used across all criteria.

labels.shortDescription: Label for automatic Grid update toggle
labels.value: Automatically include new funds and share classes in the Grid

labels.shortDescription: Field label for the Automatic Grid Update flag in Agreement Grid Recap
Title of the Grid Builder module
Column header for current grid recap
Error context for grid loading failure
Error message when loading products fails
Error message when grid settings fail to load
Error message when retrieving products fails
Error context for grid save failure
Error when SheetJS fails to load
labels.value: Failed to load SheetJS static resource
Fix the validation errors before importing.

labels.shortDescription: Field label for Grid Name in the Agreement Grid Recap component
Label prefix for imported file name
Status text for included share class
Status text for missing share class
Empty state when no active grid is assigned to the agreement
Toast title when no grid available
Message when no grid is found
labels.value: No grid selection found for this product.

labels.shortDescription: Message when no new share classes were added
labels.value: No new share classes were added.

labels.shortDescription: Message displayed when no products are available
Title shown when no products are found

labels.value: No products found to validate with the current selection.

labels.shortDescription: Message shown when no products match the search criteria
labels.value: No products matched the search criteria.

labels.shortDescription: Title when no share classes are found
Message when no share classes are available to add to the Grid
labels.value: No share classes found to add to the Grid.
This product is already assigned to a grid. New share classes can only be added to the same grid. To reassign, remove the product from the Recap first.

labels.shortDescription: Action label to remove a product
Button label to reset all selections
Confirmation text before resetting all selected share classes and criteria
labels.value: Are you sure you want to reset all selected share classes and criteria? This action cannot be undone.

labels.shortDescription: Notification shown after all selections and criteria have been reset
labels.value: All selections and criteria have been reset.

labels.shortDescription: Message shown after saving a grid; use {0} as placeholder for the grid name
Error message when Grid Builder Setting is not found; use {0} for setting name
labels.value: The Grid Builder Setting {0} was not found. Please contact your system administrator.

labels.shortDescription: Success message when share classes are added; use {0} for count
labels.value: {0} share classes have been added to the Grid.

labels.shortDescription: Toast title for added share classes
Warning when share classes cannot be added due to grid conflict
labels.value: {0} share class(es) were not added because their product is already assigned to a different grid.

labels.shortDescription: Warning: share classes not added, not in selected standard grid
labels.value: {0} share class(es) matched your filter but were not added because they don't belong to the selected standard grid.

labels.shortDescription: Info: this filter is applied independently of other filter logic
labels.value: This filter is applied independently of other filter logic.
Some rows failed. Review details below.

labels.shortDescription: Section label for standard grids in Agreement Grid Recap
Button label to view excluded products

labels.value: Please select a client attendees, and be sure to choose products and select rating for each one in case of Sales Presentation!
Please add a rating for each discussed product!
Please fill up requiered fields in 'Follow Up section'!
Error Occurred. Please contact your Admin.
Do you want to add all subscriptions?
Subscriptions for all the Fund/Shares have been added successfully.
Do you want to remove all subscriptions?
Subscriptions for all the Fund/Shares have been removed successfully.
Please wait, you are being redirected... Please refresh the record page once it is loaded to see the changes.
You must select a Risk Level.
Related records show up here on an interactive timeline. Check your filter or create a record.
Records of type '{0}' are not supported.

If you want a publication in the language specified in the 'source language' field, make sure it is also included in the 'target languages' field. If the source language is missing from the target languages, no publication request will be created for it

labels.shortDescription: Generic label for error message text
Unknown Competitor Assets Record Type ID

labels.value: This role already exist for this legal entity and agreement
For the event campaign you've chosen, we've automatically excluded all contacts who have opted out of receiving event invitations!
For the newsletter campaign you've selected, we've automatically excluded all contacts who have opted out of receiving newsletters!
The Carmignac contacts, opt-out and hard bounced contacts have been excluded from the results.
Synced failed. Please fill in all the website fields.
